get.description:
Deep health check: verifies DB and Redis connectivity.

Returns HTTP 200 if all dependencies are healthy.
Returns HTTP 503 if any dependency is unreachable.

post.description:
Exchange an Auth0 id_token for an internal JWT + refresh token.

Creates the student record on first login (upsert).
Returns 403 if the account is suspended or pending.
Exchange Auth0 id_token for teacher internal JWT.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access JWT.
Delete the refresh token from Redis.

Trigger Auth0 password reset email.

Always returns HTTP 200 regardless of whether the email is registered.
Different responses would leak registered email addresses.

patch.description: Update student name, locale, or grade.

get.description: Return display name, locale, and notification preferences for the student.

patch.description: Update display name, locale, and/or notification preferences.

delete.description:
Initiate GDPR account deletion.

Soft-deletes the account immediately and dispatches a Celery task
to anonymise PII and delete from Auth0.  Always returns 200.

post.description:
Authenticate an internal admin user with email + password.

Lockout: 5 failures → 423 Locked for 15 minutes (Redis-backed).
bcrypt verify runs in thread pool executor (non-blocking).
Exchange an admin refresh token for a new admin JWT.

Store a one-time reset token in Redis (TTL 1 hr).

Always returns 200 — different responses leak registered emails.
The reset link/token would normally be emailed; for Phase 1 it is
returned in the logs only (email integration is Phase 2+).
Consume a one-time reset token and set a new password.

patch.description: Suspend or reactivate a teacher account.

Suspend or reactivate a school.

On suspension: cascades to all teachers + students via Celery.
On reactivation: does NOT automatically reactivate members
(per studybuddy-docs/PHASE1_SETUP.md section 10.6).

schema.title: Response List Curriculum Api V1 Curriculum Get

get.description: Download an XLSX curriculum template for the given grade.

post.description: Create a curriculum from a JSON unit list. Returns 400 with per-row errors on validation failure.
Upload an XLSX file to create a curriculum. Returns 400 with per-row errors on failure.
Dispatch an async content-generation pipeline job. Returns job_id immediately.

get.description: Poll the status of a pipeline job (reads from Redis).

put.description:
Activate a curriculum for its school/grade/year.

- Sets status='active', activated_at=NOW().
- Archives any other active curriculum for the same (school_id, grade, year).
- Invalidates cur:{student_id} Redis cache for all enrolled students.

get.description:
Return the full subject + unit tree for the authenticated student.

Resolves curriculum_id via enrollment (school custom) or default-{year}-g{grade}.
Returns the shape the web frontend expects:
  { curriculum_id, grade, subjects: [{ subject, units: [{ unit_id, title, subject, grade, sort_order, has_lab }] }] }

schema.title: Response Get Curriculum Tree Api V1 Curriculum Tree Get

get.description: Return the full subject + unit tree for a grade (5–12).

Serve a lesson for the given unit.

Entitlement guard: free-tier students are limited to 2 lessons.
Increments lessons_accessed after serving.

Return a URL for the lesson MP3 audio file.

For local dev (no S3): returns a /static/content/... URL.
For production: returns a pre-signed S3 URL.

Never proxies audio bytes through this server.
Serve a quiz set, rotating through sets 1→2→3→1 per student per unit.
Serve the tutorial for a unit.

Serve the lab experiment for a unit.
Returns 404 if no experiment file exists (non-lab unit).

post.description:
Student reports a content issue.
Stores in student_content_feedback table.

Student submits feedback on a specific marked portion of content.
Stored as student_content_feedback with content_type from body.

get.description:
Return the current minimum and latest app versions.
Loaded from the app_versions table (platform='all' or platform='ios'/'android').

post.description:
Open a new quiz session for a student.

attempt_number is computed server-side (COUNT prior completed sessions + 1).

Record a single quiz answer.

Write is fire-and-forget via Celery task — returns 200 before DB write.
The session_id ownership is verified synchronously first.

Close a session and compute the final score + passed flag.

Score is written synchronously (client needs the result immediately).
Streak update and progress view refresh are dispatched as Celery tasks.
Dashboard cache for this student is invalidated.

get.description:
Return the full raw progress history for the authenticated student.

Returns sessions ordered newest-first, with answers nested inside.

Aggregated dashboard card for the authenticated student.

Cached at L2 Redis (60 s TTL); invalidated on session/end.

Curriculum map with per-unit status badges.

Reads from mv_student_curriculum_progress (materialized view).

Usage statistics for the requested period (7d | 30d | all).

Includes daily_activity breakdown and streak counters from Redis.

post.description: Register or refresh an FCM push token for the authenticated student.

delete.description: Remove an FCM push token for the authenticated student.

schema.title: Response Deregister Push Token Api V1 Notifications Token Delete

get.description: Return notification preferences for the authenticated student.

put.description: Update notification preferences for the authenticated student.

post.description:
Record that a student opened a lesson.

Creates a lesson_views row with started_at = NOW().
The mobile app stores the returned view_id and sends it when the lesson closes.

Record that a student closed a lesson (fire-and-forget write).

Verifies view ownership synchronously, then dispatches a Celery task
for the actual DB write. Returns 200 before the write completes.

get.description: Return self-service analytics for the authenticated student.

Return streak, session dates, and summary stats for the student dashboard.

streak_days     — consecutive days with at least one completed session (ending today)
session_dates   — ISO date strings (YYYY-MM-DD) for the last 30 days that had sessions

schema.title: Response Student Stats Api V1 Analytics Student Stats Get

get.description:
Return aggregate per-unit analytics for all enrolled students in a school.

Requires teacher JWT. Teachers can only view their own school's data.
Return the current subscription plan and status for the authenticated student.

post.description:
Create a Stripe Checkout Session and return the hosted checkout URL.

The mobile app opens this URL in a browser / in-app WebView.
On success, Stripe calls POST /subscription/webhook with checkout.session.completed.

Stripe webhook endpoint.

Security:
  1. Validates Stripe-Signature header — rejects with 400 on failure.
  2. Deduplicates by stripe_event_id — returns 200 if already processed.
  3. Logs every event to stripe_events table.

Always returns 200 to Stripe after signature verification so Stripe
does not retry unnecessarily. Processing errors are logged but don't
change the HTTP response code.

Note: this endpoint does NOT use get_current_student — it is authenticated
via the Stripe webhook signature only.

schema.title: Response Stripe Webhook Api V1 Subscription Webhook Post

delete.description:
Cancel the student's subscription at the end of the current billing period.

The student retains access until current_period_end.
Entitlement cache is expired immediately.

get.description: Return a summary of content pipeline runs and version statuses.
List content subject versions, optionally filtered.
Return full detail for a single content version: metadata, units, review history, annotations.
Return unit title and list of available content type files on disk.
Read and return raw content JSON for the specified type from disk.

post.description: Open a review session for a content subject version.
Add a text annotation to a unit within a content version.

schema.title: Response Delete Annotation Endpoint Api V1 Admin Content Review Annotations  Annotation Id  Delete

post.description: Submit language and content ratings (1–5) for a version.
Approve a content version for publishing.
Reject a content version. Set regenerate=true to trigger pipeline rerun.
Block a unit's content type and mark the subject version as blocked.

Publish a content version.

Archives the current published version, marks this one published,
invalidates Redis content cache and CloudFront CDN.

Rollback to a previous version.

Archives the current published version and restores the target.
Invalidates Redis and CDN.
Block a specific content item (school-scoped or platform-wide).

get.description: List student marked-text feedback for a unit.
Units with student feedback count >= threshold, ordered by report count desc.
Return subscription MRR, active counts, new/cancelled this month, churn rate.
Return units ordered by struggle (mean_attempts desc, pass_rate asc).
Look up definitions, synonyms, and antonyms via Datamuse (+ optional Merriam-Webster).

post.description:
Validate a grade JSON file, save it to /data/grade{N}_stem.json,
and seed the curricula + curriculum_units tables.

Dispatch a run_grade_pipeline_task Celery job for the given grade.

Returns immediately with job_id; poll GET /admin/pipeline/{job_id}/status
for progress. Content is built with auto_approve=False so all output goes
to the review queue.

get.description: Return paginated pipeline job history from DB, enriched with live Redis status.

schema.title: Response Admin Pipeline Jobs Api V1 Admin Pipeline Jobs Get

get.description: Return the current job state, preferring live Redis data with DB fallback.

Upload a student email roster for the school (school_admin only).

List content subject versions for this school's own curricula plus all

and represent the base content teachers can assign from.

Submit an email address to request a demo account.

Sends a verification link to the provided email.
Rate-limited to 3 requests per IP per hour.

get.description:
Verify an email address via the token from the verification link.

Creates the demo student account and emails login credentials.

post.description:
Authenticate a demo student with email + password.

Returns a short-lived JWT (role=demo_student).
No refresh token — demo accounts are short-lived.

Log out a demo student by blacklisting the JWT JTI in Redis.

The blacklist TTL matches the token's remaining lifetime so the key
auto-expires without a background sweep.

Resend the verification email to a pending demo request.

Enforces a per-email cooldown (default 5 minutes).

Submit an email address to request a teacher demo account.

Sends a verification link to the provided email.
Rate-limited to 3 requests per IP per hour.

Creates the demo teacher account and emails login credentials.

post.description:
Authenticate a demo teacher with email + password.

Returns a short-lived JWT (role=demo_teacher).
Log out a demo teacher by blacklisting the JWT JTI in Redis.

Resend the teacher verification email to a pending demo request.

Enforces a per-email cooldown (default 5 minutes).

get.description: List all demo account requests with optional filters.

post.description:
Extend a demo account's TTL.

Sets expires_at = NOW() + {hours} hours (max 168 hours / 7 days).

Revoke an active demo account immediately.

- Sets demo_accounts.revoked_at / revoked_by
- Marks demo_requests.status = 'revoked'
- Soft-deletes the student row (account_status = 'deleted')

Resend the verification email for a pending demo request.

Invalidates the current token and issues a fresh one.
Does not enforce cooldown (admin override).

ForgotPasswordRequest.title: ForgotPasswordRequest
ForgotPasswordRequest.description:
POST /auth/forgot-password

Accepts any string containing '@' — strict EmailStr validation is intentionally
avoided here so that the endpoint always returns 200 regardless of input format,
preventing enumeration of valid email addresses or formats.
